summary: Full e2e testing of HGL video processing app - Login, metadata extraction, video config, and clip processing. All critical flows working correctly.

minor.issue: yt-dlp path was missing full path - FIXED by testing agent

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing durationOptions dependency - minor

critical_code_review_comments: uuid4 import was correctly added (line 10 in video_processing.py)
yt-dlp path fixed in background task (line 304) - was using 'yt-dlp' instead of '/root/.venv/bin/yt-dlp'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical flows tested and working: Login -> Dashboard (paste URL) -> extract-metadata API -> VideoConfigPage (shows title, duration 3:33min, views 1758.8M, channel) -> process-clips API -> Editor page. The yt-dlp path issue in background task was fixed. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_video_api.py cover auth, metadata extraction, and clip processing.

flows_tested: Dashboard URL input and Fazer Upload button
VideoConfigPage metadata display (title, duration, views, channel)
Próximo button and process-clips API call

verified_features: Extração de metadados de vídeo real com yt-dlp - endpoint /api/video/extract-metadata - WORKING
Dashboard: colar URL do YouTube e clicar 'Fazer Upload' - WORKING
VideoConfigPage: exibir metadados (título, duração, views formatadas, canal) - WORKING
Clicar em 'Próximo' e processar clips sem erro 'body stream already read' - WORKING
Backend: endpoint /api/video/process-clips funciona sem erro uuid4 - WORKING
Metadados exibidos corretamente na UI - WORKING
